description_long: This object is a hybrid axe featuring a robust, dark metallic blade with a wide, slightly curved cutting edge and a rectangular poll. The blade is mounted to a wooden handle that is straight and thick, with a natural wood grain texture and a squared-off end. Uniquely, the axe is equipped with a mounted optical scope on top of the blade, giving it a tactical or novelty appearance. The scope is black, cylindrical, and features adjustment knobs and a lens hood, suggesting a design inspired by firearm optics. The overall construction appears solid and functional, with the handle and blade joined in a traditional manner. The combination of wood, metal, and the modern scope creates a striking contrast between classic and contemporary elements.
description: A sturdy axe with a wooden handle and a wide metal blade, topped with a mounted black optical scope for a tactical look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden handle, wide metal blade, and the mounted black scope on top.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the scope with the blade and the narrow profile of the axe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle, blade, and scope, mirroring the first side but with reversed orientation.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden handle and the back of the scope, with the blade edge barely visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, thick wooden handle with a squared-off end, natural wood grain, rectangular cross-section, no added grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Wide, slightly curved single-edge blade with a rectangular poll, no beard, and a flat top; topped with a mounted optical scope.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting of blade to handle, with modern scope attached to blade top.
